title: Secure steward adoption + ≥1 documented citation/use
context: Project 'shipped' requires a named steward committing to adopt/host/cite the graph and at least one documented downstream reuse. Only open / public-domain / openly-licensed sources (CIViC CC0, Open Targets CC0, Reactome, license-checked PMC open-access subset); COSMIC, OncoKB, DrugBank, any non-open DB and all controlled-access / patient-level data (dbGaP, EGA, biobanks, EHR) are out of scope and refused. No patient data; all therapeutic-target content is research evidence labeled 'not medical advice'. See PLAN.md.
objective: Secure a named research/advocacy steward (or KG consortium) that commits to adopt/host and cite the graph, and document at least one concrete citation or downstream reuse.
acceptanceCriteria: A named research/advocacy steward (or KG consortium) commits to adopt/host and cite the graph.
≥1 concrete citation or downstream reuse (e.g. Monarch/Translator ingest) is documented.
output: A steward-adoption record + documented citation/reuse evidence, committed via PR.
